title: Something + Origin
description: Pick Origin → Explore the World → Level Up, Upgrade → Create a Beautiful Place → Die a Horrific Death in the Dungeons → Wonder Why, Why Play This Random Modpack!
body:
<!> First time making a Modpack.
![Something + Origin Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30d4b5de1e4838db539203d357390fd0082256b.png)
## Multiple Origins, BetterCombat, Immersive Experience, Spicy World Gen, Variety of Dungeons, Leveling & Exploration.

### Core Features
**(Tweaked) Origins + Medieval Origins**
- Variety of Origins to choose from that will affect your gameplay or completely overhaul how you approach the game.

**Challenging Dungeons**
- Be careful in the Dungeons, they're **Dangerous**, no joke. You must carefully approach it with proper gear, weapons, tools & supplies or you'll run dry and die!
Make sure to bring enough campfires, food & bandages or a Healer. And approach it with tactics.

**Weapon & Armor & Artifacts**
- Variety of Weapon Types, Weapons, Unique Weapons, Tiers ranging from Uncommon to Mythic.
Armors as well with variety of Trinkets and Artifacts you can craft or find in the Dungeons.

**Leveling & Classing**
- There Are No Specific Classes. You can combine it however you like. You can level up and scale with a skill tree to get better.

**World Generation**
- Vast deep oceans to tall mountains. This pack contains multiple world gen mods.

**Magic & Abilities**
- Origins have their innate abilities, but you can also gain them from Skill Trees and Magic Tomes or some sort of Ability Tomes. This pack also has Zenith.

**Immersion**
- Mods that make your movement, combat, visuals and sound more immersive.
  There's no Lore or Quests to further immerse yourself so atleast for now it is up to you.

I'm an idiot making a Modpack to play with others, hopefully you'll like it! c:
Join Our Discord Community? [https://discord.com/invite/H4kvRz5bZH](https://discord.com/invite/H4kvRz5bZH)

## Planned Updates / Road-Map
<!> Not Listed In Order.

- Make the Modpack look better Aesthetically.
- Custom Recipes for a smoother experience.
- Fixing Any Conflicts, Updates, Configurations to make the Modpack more Enjoyable.
- Completely Re-Working the Skill Tree and Leveling System.
  Either adding my own or overhauling the existing ones.
  Also might need to balance them.
- Make better Logos / Icons. (plz don't judge my quick art :c)
- Make it easier for people to approach me to report bugs etc. if they want to. _If anyone ends up playing this apart from me and a few others z.z_
- Uploading Modpack to other places to increase engagement.
  You can also help with that c:

# Updating Frequently, Modpack Gets Better and Better!

<sad> There are some known issues that I have to figure out and fix.
I've gotten rid of most of them. Hopefully I'll solve all of them sooner rather than later.

If you are someone good with this stuff and would like to help out, join my Discord and reach out to me.

_Also for any Legal Stuff, I do Not own any of the Mods or hold any rights to them. look at each and every individual mod regarding legal stuff. Idk anything about Legal stuff so... yah._
